question: How many transactions does each account have? (Top 10)
sql_answer_text: SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) AS txn_count FROM trans GROUP BY account_id ORDER BY txn_count DESC LIMIT 10;

question: How many accounts have more than 5 loans?
sql_answer_text: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT account_id FROM loan GROUP BY account_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) x;
notes: Column loan_count does not exist. Must count loans via JOIN and GROUP BY.

question: How many accounts have more transactions than the average account?
sql_answer_text: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM trans GROUP BY account_id HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(c) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM trans GROUP BY account_id) x)) t;

question: Which account has the maximum balance recorded in transactions?
sql_answer_text: SELECT account_id, SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM trans GROUP BY account_id ORDER BY total_balance DESC LIMIT 1;
notes: Invalid nested aggregation: MAX(SUM(balance)) not allowed. Use ORDER BY SUM(balance) DESC LIMIT 1.

question: How many posts are recorded?
sql_answer_text: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM users;

question: How many users have more than 5 posts?
sql_answer_text: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts GROUP BY OwnerUserId HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) x;
notes: Column post_count does not exist in users table. Must count posts via GROUP BY on posts table.

question: Which 10 users have written the most posts?
sql_answer_text: SELECT OwnerUserId, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM posts GROUP BY OwnerUserId ORDER BY post_count DESC LIMIT 10;

question: How many users have more posts than the average user?
sql_answer_text: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT OwnerUserId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM posts GROUP BY OwnerUserId HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(c) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM posts GROUP BY OwnerUserId) x)) t;

question: Which user has the highest total votes received on their posts?
sql_answer_text: SELECT p.OwnerUserId, COUNT(*) AS vote_count FROM posts p JOIN votes v ON v.PostId = p.Id GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId ORDER BY vote_count DESC LIMIT 1;
notes: Invalid nested aggregation and wrong logic. Votes must be joined with posts to attribute votes to post owners.

question: How many patients are recorded?
sql_answer_text: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patient;
